name: interoptimus

metadata.name: InterOptimus
metadata.summary: High througput simulation making crystalline interfaces

functions.name: InterOptimus.VaspWorkFlow.get_initial_film
documentation: get the non-deformed film

functions.name: InterOptimus.VaspWorkFlow.get_film_c_length
documentation: get the normal length of film slab

functions.name: InterOptimus.VaspWorkFlow.SlabEnergyWorkflows
documentation: work flow to calculate slab energy

functions.name: InterOptimus.tool.get_min_nb_distance
documentation:
get the minimum neighboring distance for certain atom in a structure

Args:
atom_index (int): atom index in the structure
structure (Structure)

Return:
(float): nearest neighboring distance

functions.name: InterOptimus.tool.sort_list
documentation:
sort list by keys

Args:
array_to_sort (array): array to sort
keys (array): sorting keys

Return:
(array): sorted array

functions.name: InterOptimus.tool.apply_cnid_rbt
documentation:
apply rigid body translation to an interface.

Args:
interface (Interface): interface before translation
x (float), y (float): fractional cnid coordinates
z: fractional coordinates in c
Return:
interface (Interface): interface after translation

functions.name: InterOptimus.tool.get_termination_indices
documentation:
get the terminating atom indices of a slab.

Args:
(Structure): slab structure.

Return:
(arrays): terminating atom indices at the top and bottom.

functions.name: InterOptimus.tool.get_termination_indices_shell
documentation:
get the terminating atom indices of a slab.

Args:
(Structure): slab structure.
shell(float): shell size to include termination atoms

Return:
(arrays): terminating atom indices at the top and bottom.

functions.name: InterOptimus.tool.get_it_core_indices
documentation:
get the terminating atom indices of a interface.

Args:
interface (Interface).

Returns:
(arrays): film top & bottom indices; substrate top & bottom indices.

functions.name: InterOptimus.tool.get_rot_strain
documentation: Find transformation matrix that will rotate and strain the film to the substrate while preserving the c-axis.

functions.name: InterOptimus.itworker.update_setting_dict
documentation:
update old dict by new dict

Args:
old_dict (dict)
new_dict (dict)

functions.name: InterOptimus.itworker.get_potcar
documentation:
get the pymatgen Potcar instance for a structure

structure (Structure)
functional (str): functional set to use

(Potcar)

functions.name: InterOptimus.itworker.get_potcar_dict
InterOptimus.itworker.get_default_incar_settings
documentation:
get default incar settings

Args:
name (str): what to calculate

functions.name: InterOptimus.itworker.get_vasp_input_settings
documentation:
get user vasp input settings

Args:
name (str): one of 'standard relax', 'standard static', 'interface static', 'interface relax'
structure (Structure): structure for calculation
##ENCUT_scale (float): scaling factor of the maximum en_cut in potcars
update_incar_settings, update_potcar_settings, update_kpoints_settings (dict): user incar, potcar, kpoints settings
update_potcar_functional (str): which set of functional to use

Return:
(VaspInputSet)

functions.name: InterOptimus.itworker.registration_minimizer
documentation:
baysian optimization for xyz registration

Args:
n_calls (int): num of optimization
z_range (float): range of z sampling

Return:
optimization result

classes.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.__init__
documentation:
Args:
film_conv (Structure): film conventional cell
substrate_conv (Structure): substrate conventional cell

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.lattice_matching
documentation:
lattice matching by Zur and McGill

Args:
max_area (float), max_length_tol (float), max_angle_tol (float): searching tolerance parameters
film_max_miller (int), substrate_max_miller (int): maximum miller index
film_millers (None|array), substrate_millers (None|array): specified searching miller indices (optional)

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.parse_interface_structure_params
documentation:
parse necessary structure parameters for interface generation in the next steps

Args:

termination_ftol (float): tolerance of the c-fractional coordinates for termination atom clustering
c_periodic (bool): whether to make double interface supercell
vacuum_over_film (float): vacuum thickness over film
film_thickness (float): film slab thickness
substrate_thickness (float): substrate slab thickness
shift_to_bottom (bool): whether to shift the supercell to the bottom

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.get_specified_match_cib
documentation:
get the CoherentInterfaceBuilder instance for a specified unique match

Args:
id (int): unique match index

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.get_unique_terminations
documentation:
get non-identical terminations for a specified unique match id

Args:
id (int): unique match index

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.get_all_unique_terminations
documentation: get unique terminations for all the unique matches

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.get_specified_interface
documentation:
get a specified interface by unique match index, unique termination index, and xyz registration

Args:
match_id (int): unique match index
term_id (int): unique termination index
xyz (array): xyz registration

Return:
(Interface)

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.set_energy_calculator_docker
documentation:
set energy calculator docker container

Args:
calc (str): mace, orb-models, sevenn, chgnet, grace-2l

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.close_energy_calculator
documentation: close energy calculator docker container

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.sample_xyz_energy
documentation:
sample the predicted energy for a specified xyz registration of a initial interface

Args:
xyz: sampled xyz

Return
energy (float): predicted energy by chgnet

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.get_film_substrate_layer_thickness
documentation: get single layer thickness

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.get_decomposition_slabs
documentation:
get decomposed film & substrate slabs to calculate binding energy

Args:
match_id (int): unique match index
term_id (int): unique termination index

Return:
(single_film, single_substrate), (double_film, double_substrate) (tuple): single and double (film, substrate) pairs

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.get_interface_energy_and_binding_energy
documentation:
calculate interface energy & interface binding energy

Args:
supcl_E: interface supercell energy
match_id (int): unique match index
term_id (int): unique termination index

Return:
(float): interface energy
(float): binding energy
single_pair, double_pair (tuple): slab pairs

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.get_interface_atom_indices
documentation:
get the indices of interface atoms

Args:
match_id (int): unique match id
term_id (int): unique term id

Return:
indices (array)

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.optimize_specified_interface_by_mlip
documentation:
apply bassian optimization for the xyz registration of a specified interface with the predicted
interface energy by machine learning potential

Args:
match_id (int): unique match id
term_id (int): unique term id
n_calls (int): number of calls
z_range (tuple): sampling range of z
calc: MLIP calculator (str): mace, orb-models, sevenn, chgnet, grace-2l

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.global_minimization
documentation:
apply bassian optimization for the xyz registration of all the interfaces with the predicted
interface energy by machine learning potential, getting ranked interface energies

Args:
match_id (int): unique match id
term_id (int): unique term id
n_calls (int): number of calls
z_range (tuple): sampling range of z
calc (str): MLIP calculator: mace, orb-models, sevenn, chgnet, grace-2l
discut: (float): allowed minimum atomic distance for searching

methods.name: InterOptimus.itworker.InterfaceWorker.random_sampling_specified_interface
documentation: perform random sampling of rigid body translation for a specified interface
core class for the interface jobs

functions.name: InterOptimus.core.RelaxCryst
documentation: class generate

modules.name: InterOptimus.equi_term
documentation:
This module provides functions to determine whether two sets of slabs with
different terminations making identical interfaces

functions.name: InterOptimus.equi_term.is_colinear
documentation:
determine whether two vectors are colinear

Args:
a, g (array or list): two vectors
directional (bool): whether considering the direction
tol: tolerance
Return:
(bool): True if colinear

functions.name: InterOptimus.equi_term.get_rotation_from_match
documentation:
convert supercell match matrix into rotation matrix

Args:
lattice_by_row_vectors (array): lattice to transform by row vectors.
S (array): supercell matching matrix.

Return:
(array): rotation matrix

functions.name: InterOptimus.equi_term.co_point_group_operations
documentation:
given two structures, get the their union point group

Args:
sym_ops_s1, sym_ops_s2 (lists): lists of point group operations

Return:
co_group (list): list of symmetry operations

functions.name: InterOptimus.equi_term.pair_fit
documentation:
determine whether two pairs of film/substrate pairs are identical

Args:
film_slab_fit, sub_slab_fit (Structure): reference pair
film_slab, sub_slab (Structure): comparing pair
c_periodic: whether the periodic boundary condition is set along the c-direction of the interface supercell, which means no vacuum layers are included.

Return:
(bool): whether identical

functions.name: InterOptimus.equi_term.slab_pair_cluster
documentation:
clarify film-substrate slab pairs so that those clustered into the same group generate identical termination conditions

Args:
film_slabs(list): list of film slabs.
sub_slabs(list): list of substrate slabs.
c_periodic(bool): whether the periodic boundary condition is set along the c-direction of the interface supercell, which means no vacuum layers are included.

Return:
slab_pair_groups, slab_pair_id_groups(list): groups of slab pairs and pair ids([film_id, slab_id, loop_id])

functions.name: InterOptimus.equi_term.get_non_identical_slab_pairs
documentation:
get the ids of the non-identical slab pairs

Args:
film (Slab): film slab
substrate (Slab): substrate slab
match (dict): lattice match information
ftol (float): toleration for flat cluster to distinguish atomic planes
c_periodic (bool): whether c-direction is considered periodic

Return:
list of non-identical slab pairs

modules.name: InterOptimus.CNID
documentation: This module calculate CNID vectors for a interface

functions.name: InterOptimus.CNID.get_au_vector
documentation:
calculate the auxiliary vector of two vectors

Args:
B (array): two column vectors

Return:
(array): auxiliary normalized vector perpendicular to the input

functions.name: InterOptimus.CNID.from_2D_to_3D_transformation
documentation:
calculate the 3D transformation matrix of two 2D bases

Args:
B1, B2 (arrays): two bases

Return:
rotation matrix converting B2 to B1

functions.name: InterOptimus.CNID.get_au_lattice
documentation:
get the auxiliary 3D lattice for a 2D basis

Args:
B (array): 2D basis

Return:
(array): 3D auxiliary lattice vectors

functions.name: InterOptimus.CNID.triple_dot
documentation: combined product

functions.name: InterOptimus.CNID.calculate_cnid_in_supercell
documentation:
calculate CNID for a interface

Args:
interface (Interface)

Return:
(array, dtype = float): CNID vectors by float
(array, dtype = string): CNID vectors by rational numbers

modules.name: InterOptimus.MPsoap
documentation: This module provides class to extract SOAP descriptors of the non-identical sites in the crystalline materials in Materials Project.

functions.name: InterOptimus.MPsoap.get_Z
documentation:
given structure, get element names.

Args:
    struct (Structure).
    
Return:
    list of atomic numbers.

functions.name: InterOptimus.MPsoap.generate_combinations
documentation:
given elements, get all possible combinations.

Args:
    elements (list): list of elements.
    
Return:
    combinations (list): list of combinations.

functions.name: InterOptimus.MPsoap.get_elements
documentation:
given structure, get atomic number list.

Args:
    struct (Structure).
    
Return:
    list of elements.

functions.name: InterOptimus.MPsoap.to_ase
documentation:
given pymatgen structure, get ase Atoms.

Args:
    struct (Structure).
    
return:
    ase Atoms.

functions.name: InterOptimus.MPsoap.MPsearch
documentation:
searching for synthesized structures including at least a set of elements from Materials Project.

Args:
    elements (list): list of elments included at least.
    API_KEY (str): API key.

return:
    docs (list): list of searching results.

functions.name: InterOptimus.MPsoap.get_min_nb_distance
documentation:
get the minimum neighboring distance for certain atom in a structure

atom_index (int): atom index in the structure
structure (Structure)

(float): nearest neighboring distance

soap_params (dict): SOAP parameters.

methods.name: InterOptimus.MPsoap.soap_data_generator.cluster_by_element

methods.name: InterOptimus.MPsoap.soap_data_generator.get_distances

get the distances(dissimilarities) of all the descriptors

distance_pdist (array): distance list.
generate soap data from MP database.

classes.name: InterOptimus.MPsoap.soap_info
documentation:
soap descriptor information

Args:
vector (array): soap descripor.
center_element (string): center element name.
belonging_structure_index (int): which structure it belongs to.
site_index (int): which site it is.
min_nb_distance: nearest neighboring distance.

methods.name: InterOptimus.MPsoap.soap_analyzer.extract_soap_for_searching_elements

extract soap for determined elements

cons_elements (list): elements to extract their soaps

modules.name: InterOptimus.optimize
documentation:
This module provides class to calculate the optimizing score of a interface structure by
comparing the terminating atom environment with those in materials project

functions.name: InterOptimus.optimize.EN_kernel

classes.name: InterOptimus.optimize.interface_pre_optimizer

methods.name: InterOptimus.optimize.interface_pre_optimizer.__init__
documentation:
Args:
cib (CoherentInterfaceBuilder).
termination (string): termination.
soap_data (soap_data_generator): SOAP data class with MP SOAP information.
slab_length (float): minimum slab length.
c_periodic (bool): whether set c-direction as periodic boundary condition.
vacuum_over_film (float): length of vaccum over film.

methods.name: InterOptimus.optimize.interface_pre_optimizer.trial
documentation:
score a structure with x, y, z interface registration

Args:
params (list): interface registration
ksai (int): power

Return:
(list): scores for all terminating atoms

modules.name: InterOptimus.matching
documentation:
This module provide classes to get lattice matching results by sorting the
results from pymatgen's SubstrateAnalyzer

functions.name: InterOptimus.matching.get_cos
documentation: cosine distance

functions.name: InterOptimus.matching.get_area_match
documentation: matching area

functions.name: InterOptimus.matching.match_search
documentation:
given substrate, film lattice structures,     get non-identical matches and identical match groups

Args:
substrate (Structure): primitive structure of the substrate material
film (Structure): primitive structure of the film material

Return:
unique_matches (list): list of non-identical matches.
equivalent_matches (list): clustered identical matches.
unique_areas (list): list of matching areas of non-identical matches

functions.name: InterOptimus.matching.get_area
documentation: get the areas of included by two basic vectors

functions.name: InterOptimus.matching.interface_searching
documentation:
given substrate, film lattice structures,     get non-identical matches and identical match groups

Args:
substrate (Structure): primitive structure of the substrate material
film (Structure): primitive structure of the film material
sub_analyzer (SubstrateAnalyzer): SubstrateAnalyzer setting lattice matching parameters

Return:
unique_matches (list): list of non-identical matches.
equivalent_matches (list): clustered identical matches.
unique_matches_indices_data (list): indices information of non-identical matches.
equivalent_matches_indices_data (list): clustered indices information of identical matches
areas (list): list of matching areas of non-identical matches
